name: Filled Sugar Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Raisins, cut-up dates or Figs
If using self-rising flour, omit baking soda and cream of tartar.
recipeInstructions:
Mix powdered sugar, margarine, vanilla, almond extract, and egg. Stir in remaining ingredients except granulated sugar. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours.
Cook raisins, sugar, nuts, and water until mixture thickens; cool. Roll dough 1/8 inch thick. Cut into 24 circles with a 2-1/2-inch doughnut cutter that has the center removed. Replace the center and cut out another 24 circles. Place whole circles on lightly greased cookie sheet. Top each with raisin mixture, spreading almost to edges. Top with remaining circles. Press edges together with a floured fork. Sprinkle tops with granulated sugar. Bake 8 to 10 minutes or until light brown; cool. Makes 2 dozen cookies. 245 calories per cookie.
